nasb.text: And Jesus said to His disciples, “Truly I say to you, it is hard for a rich man to enter the kingdom of heaven.

esv.text: And Jesus said to his disciples, “Truly, I say to you, only with difficulty will a rich person enter the kingdom of heaven.

cnv.text: 耶穌對門徒說：“我實在告訴你們，有錢的人是很難進天國的。

ccb.text: 事后，耶稣对门徒说：“我实在告诉你们，有钱人进天国很困难。

csbs.text: 耶稣对他的门徒们说：“我确实地告诉你们：富有的人进入天国会很困难。
